data.title: Kelun-Biotech Announces Results from the SKB264-II-06/MK-2870-002 Study of Sacituzumab Tirumotecan (Sac-TMT) in Gynecologic Oncology Presented at 2026 SGO
data.description: Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. in Chengdu, China, recently disclosed updates from Phase II study SKB264-II-06/MK-2870-002 regarding their products aimed at treating ovarian and cervical cancers. The company, listed as 6990.HK, highlighted findings from both cancer cohorts.

data.title: HNTB welcomes former NJDOT Commissioner Francis O'Connor
data.description: Experienced transportation professional Francis O'Connor has joined HNTB to enhance the company's public-sector and tolling knowledge. The appointment, effective April 13, 2026, in Newark, New Jersey, signifies HNTB's strategic growth initiatives and commitment to fostering client partnerships. O'Connor, a veteran in the field, brings a wealth of experience to the organization. This move bolsters HNTB's robust national transportation capabilities and underscores its dedication to providing top-tier services to its clients.

data.title: Dallas Wings and GEICO Announce Multi-Year Partnership
data.description: In New York today, the Dallas Wings and GEICO revealed a new multi-year partnership, underscoring their joint dedication to women's sports, youth development, and community outreach in North Texas. Through this collaboration, GEICO becomes the Official Partner of the Dallas Wings, facilitating enhanced fan interactions throughout the season, encompassing game-day activities, team narratives, and youth involvement. Additionally, GEICO will take on the role of Presenting Partner for Dallas Wings Youth Basketball.

data.title: Omdia: China Smartphone Shipments Fell 1% in First Quarter of 2026 as Rising Costs Pushed Up Device Prices
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, the smartphone market in Mainland China experienced a 1% year-on-year decline according to Omdia's newest data report. Shipments of smartphones totaled 69.8 million units during this period. The market saw a decrease due to the rising costs of components, specifically memory, prompting leading vendors to raise prices of their products. Huawei led the market with 13.9 million units shipped, holding a 20% market share and showing consistent growth. Apple secured the second position with their shipment numbers.
